Your bank balance
is lying to you.

You probably think you have more money than you actually do — especially after taxes.

Most freelancers only realize it when it's too late.

Calculate my real money

Takes 10 seconds

What you can actually spend €2,250.00

"Most freelancers never see this number."

Why freelancers keep making bad money decisions

You think you have more money than you actually do

You don't set aside money for taxes consistently

You rely on your bank balance to make decisions

You get surprised by expenses every month

The Solution

See what's actually yours — not what your bank shows

Automated Reserves

Instantly set aside the exact percentage for VAT, Income Tax, and Social Security based on your specific region.

Runway Forecasting

Know exactly how many months you can survive without a new client based on your "Real Money" and recurring costs.

Spend Authorization

Ask Stoic Ledger: "Can I buy this?" and get a simple Yes/No based on your true financial health.

How it works

From chaos to stoic calm in three simple steps.

01

Connect

Securely link your business bank accounts via Open Banking. We support 2,500+ EU banks.

02

Estimate

Input your tax brackets and recurring monthly costs once. We do the rest automatically.

03

See Spend

Open the app any time to see your Real Money balance. No mental gymnastics required.

See what's actually yours — not what your bank shows

The tools you need to run a business, not just a job.

Avoid unexpected tax problems

Never fear the tax man again. Your money is already waiting in its digital vault.

Know exactly what you can spend

See the real profit margin of every project and client you work with.

Reduce financial stress

Eliminate the 3 AM financial anxiety by having a single source of truth.

Make confident decisions every week

Confidently invest in tools and outsourcing when the Ledger says "Available".
